facebook.caption: 4.8 stars. 62 reviews. One of the best-rated pho spots on the island. Phở bát đá -bún bò bát đá Anh Đạt on 12 Lê Lợi serves pho and bun bo in a stone bowl, keeping it hot from first bite to last. No frills. No tourist markup. Just a bowl that earns those stars. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Stone bowl hits the table still bubbling. Phở bát đá Anh Đạt, 4.8 stars, and a line of locals who know exactly why. Watch until the end.

instagram.caption: 4.8 stars. 62 reviews. Stone bowl pho that stays hot to the last bite. Phở bát đá Anh Đạt, 12 Lê Lợi. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Stone bowl arrives still boiling. 4.8 stars at Phở bát đá Anh Đạt. Locals eat here daily.

tiktok.caption: 4.8 stars on a stone bowl pho spot locals actually go to. Phở bát đá Anh Đạt, Phu Quoc. 📍 #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamEats #TravelTips
